headline: ₹100-300 Cr at risk if future disclosure lapses or regulatory scrutiny arise; currently N/A. — Adani Power gains regulatory nod to commence Dhirauli mine, enabling routine capacity expansion.
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, CDP, TCFD frameworks relevant for disclosure; no penalty or deadline triggered.
No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is negligible.
No material cost of capital impact; green financing not triggered.
